ops.title: Track A: authkit transitions
ops.description: Parallel from day one, no daemonkit dependency. cookiesync drops helper/Sources/cookiesync-keyhelper/ + its cask; consumes authkit via synckit/authkit bridge; DR pin per cc-sudo HelperTrust.swift. Shared-namespace guard: byte-diff the keychain access-group literal vs authkit's BEFORE deleting the keyhelper; re-scope every namespace sweep to its own tag prefix — a blanket sweep in a newly shared group is a release blocker.

ops.text: cookiesync cookie round-trip with authkit Touch ID green
authkit ABI unchanged; keychain access-group literals byte-identical; no blanket sweeps in the shared group
